content: llama-server embeddings: --embedding/--embeddings flag restricts server to embedding-only use (dedicated embedding models). /v1/embeddings (OAI) requires pooling != none, returns Euclidean-normalised vectors; /embeddings (non-OAI) supports pooling none (per-token, unnormalised). --pooling {none,mean,cls,last,rank}; model default used if unspecified. /props (model info, defaults) and /tokenize endpoints available for feature-detection and token budgeting.
